RULING:
Defendant submitted to the Court's ruling and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Gardner Denver, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Gardner Denver's alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied as to all issues because Gardner Denver did not separately identify each cause of action or claim in its separate statement.
